title: SCP-6096, The Blanket Ghost
description: Be afraid when the Blanket Ghost haunts you in the night...
body:
The Blanket Ghost adds a terrifying new monster. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-6096, also known as The Blanket Ghost.


SCP-6096 is a creature that hides beneath a blanket. During the night, it can spawn, and it will possess one of three different faces. Once it appears, it will relentlessly chase the player until the day, at which point it disappears. If SCP-6096 gets too close, you will become unable to attack anything. The only way to banish SCP-6096 temporarily is with a Crucifix. Should SCP-6096 catch up to you and attack, you’re very likely dead.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-6096 spawn?

SCP-6096 can spawn during the night on the surface in the overworld like a normal monster. However, there can only be one instance of SCP-096.

</details>



![SCP-6096](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/503214f1ed718bdeefb7b3f93381ae9e67ca19b3.png)

SCP-6096 is a creature lurking beneath a blanket. It spawns at night and can have multiple faces. When exposed to direct sunlight, SCP-6096 disappears. This entity seeks out the nearest player, always knowing their location. While SCP-6096 is slow, it is incredibly resilient and is immune to most forms of damage. If SCP-6096 attacks a player, it vanishes and delivers an instant one-hit kill when unprepared. Additionally, it causes all players within a 16-block radius to be unable to attack.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
